parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ url: $json.file_url, async: false, profiles: 'ocr', lang: 'fra+eng' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o', temperature: 0.1, max_tokens: 300, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a medical document classifier. Classify the document into exactly one of: PRESCRIPTION, LAB_RESULT, IMAGING_REPORT, REFERRAL, DISCHARGE_SUMMARY, CONSULTATION_NOTE, UNKNOWN. Respond ONLY with valid JSON: {"type":"CATEGORY","confidence":0.95,"urgency":"ROUTINE","language":"fr"} where urgency is ROUTINE, URGENT, or STAT.' }, { role: 'user', content: $json.cleaned_text.substring(0, 3000) }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o', temperature: 0.0, max_tokens: 1500, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'Extract ALL data from this prescription. Return ONLY valid JSON: {"patient":{"full_name":"","dob":"","address":"","phone":"","social_security":""},"prescriber":{"full_name":"","specialty":"","rpps_number":"","phone":"","date_signed":""},"medications":[{"name":"","dosage":"","form":"","frequency":"","duration":"","quantity":"","instructions":"","refillable":false}],"prescription_date":"","is_narcotics":false,"is_long_term":false,"special_instructions":"","extraction_confidence":0.95}' }, { role: 'user', content: $json.cleaned_text }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o', temperature: 0.0, max_tokens: 2000, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'Extract ALL data from this lab result. Return ONLY valid JSON: {"patient":{"full_name":"","dob":"","gender":"","sample_id":""},"ordering_doctor":{"full_name":"","specialty":""},"lab_info":{"lab_name":"","analysis_date":"","report_date":""},"tests":[{"name":"","code":"","value":"","unit":"","reference_range":"","flag":"NORMAL","interpretation":""}],"critical_values":[],"overall_interpretation":"","extraction_confidence":0.95}' }, { role: 'user', content: $json.cleaned_text }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o', temperature: 0.0, max_tokens: 1200, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'Extract ALL data from this imaging report. Return ONLY valid JSON: {"patient":{"full_name":"","dob":"","exam_id":""},"radiologist":{"full_name":"","specialty":""},"exam":{"type":"","modality":"","body_part":"","date":"","clinical_indication":""},"findings":"","impression":"","recommendations":"","critical_finding":false,"follow_up_required":false,"follow_up_delay":"","extraction_confidence":0.95}' }, { role: 'user', content: $json.cleaned_text }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o', temperature: 0.0, max_tokens: 1000, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'Extract key medical data from this document. Return ONLY valid JSON: {"patient":{"full_name":"","dob":""},"document_summary":"","key_findings":[],"recommendations":"","follow_up_required":false,"extraction_confidence":0.90}' }, { role: 'user', content: $json.cleaned_text }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ full_name: $json.extracted_data.patient.full_name, dob: $json.extracted_data.patient.dob, phone: $json.extracted_data.patient.phone || '', address: $json.extracted_data.patient.address || '', source: 'ai_pipeline', created_at: $now.toISO() }) }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o', temperature: 0.3, max_tokens: 300, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'Generate a concise clinical summary (max 120 words) for healthcare professionals. Include: patient identity, document type, key clinical data, urgency level, recommended action. Use professional medical language.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Doc type: ' + $json.doc_type + '
Patient: ' + ($json.extracted_data.patient.full_name || 'Unknown') + '
Urgency: ' + $json.doc_urgency + '
Data: ' + JSON.stringify($json.extracted_data).substring(0, 800) }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ text: '🚨 *ALERTE STAT — Document Médical Critique*

*Patient:* ' + ($json.extracted_data.patient.full_name || 'N/A') + '
*Type:* ' + $json.doc_type + '
*Urgence:* ' + $json.doc_urgency + '
*Doc ID:* ' + $json.doc_id + '

*Résumé clinique:*
' + $json.clinical_summary }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ personalizations: [{ to: [{ email: $json.requester_email || $env.DEFAULT_DOCTOR_EMAIL }] }], from: { email: 'pipeline@clinic.fr', name: 'Pipeline IA Médical' }, subject: '[AI Pipeline] Document traité — ' + ($json.extracted_data.patient.full_name || 'N/A') + ' (' + $json.doc_type + ')', content: [{ type: 'text/html', value: '

Document médical traité

Patient: ' + ($json.extracted_data.patient.full_name || 'N/A') + '

Type: ' + $json.doc_type + '

Urgence: ' + $json.doc_urgency + '

Résumé clinique IA :

' + $json.clinical_summary + '

Traité automatiquement par Pipeline IA — Vérification humaine recommandée pour cas STAT.

' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ parent: { database_id: $env.NOTION_FOLLOWUP_DB }, properties: { Name: { title: [{ text: { content: 'Suivi — ' + ($json.extracted_data.patient.full_name || 'N/A') + ' (' + $json.doc_type + ')' } }] }, Status: { select: { name: 'À traiter' } }, Urgence: { select: { name: $json.doc_urgency } }, 'Type Document': { select: { name: $json.doc_type } }, 'Doc ID': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: $json.doc_id } }] }, 'Résumé IA': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: $json.clinical_summary.substring(0, 2000) } }] } } }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.first().json;
const report = {
  report_id: 'COMP-' + item.doc_id,
  generated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
  document_type: item.doc_type,
  processing_pipeline: 'n8n-ai-medical-v2',
  gdpr_compliant: true,
  data_minimization: true,
  retention_policy: '7_years',
  encryption: 'AES-256',
  ai_model_used: 'gpt-4o',
  extraction_confidence: item.doc_confidence,
  human_review_required: item.has_critical || item.doc_confidence < 0.85,
  audit_trail_id: item.doc_id,
  validation_errors: item.validation_errors
};
return [{ json: { ...item, compliance_report: report, processing_status: 'SUCCESS' } }];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, doc_id: $json.doc_id, doc_type: $json.doc_type, patient: $json.extracted_data.patient.full_name, urgency: $json.doc_urgency, compliance_report_id: $json.compliance_report.report_id, processed_at: $now.toISO() }) }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ text: '❌ *Erreur Pipeline Médical*
Doc ID: ' + $json.doc_id + '
Erreurs: ' + ($json.validation_errors || ['OCR_FAILED']).join(', ') + '
Action requise: traitement manuel' }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, doc_id: $json.doc_id, errors: $json.validation_errors, message: 'Document requires manual review' }) }}

parameters.content:
## 🏥 AI Medical Document Intelligence Pipeline v2

**Variables d'env requises (Settings > Variables) :**
• OPENAI_API_KEY
• PDFCO_API_KEY (pdf.co)
• PATIENT_API_BASE (ex: https://your-api.com)
• PATIENT_API_TOKEN
• GDRIVE_ACCESS_TOKEN
• AUDIT_SHEET_ID
• NOTION_API_KEY
• NOTION_FOLLOWUP_DB (DB ID Notion)
• SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL
• SENDGRID_API_KEY
• DEFAULT_DOCTOR_EMAIL

**Flux :**
1. Webhook POST /medical-doc
2. OCR PDF → texte brut
3. GPT-4o → classification (6 types)
4. GPT-4o → extraction structurée
5. Validation des données
6. Patient lookup/create
7. Archive Drive + Audit Sheets
8. Résumé clinique GPT-4o
9. Alerte STAT Slack si urgence
10. Email médecin + tâche Notion
11. Rapport conformité RGPD
